Prefect Brukurse:
I, always thought that might is right in this world.
That's why I kept insisting that we, Orcs, deal with our problems ourselves and ask no one for help.
Look where it got us, Kasha Orcs hunted us to almost extinction!
That's why I had to change my mind. I am sure now that Orcs should cooperate with other races. Because without them there will be no Orcs.
